name: Hollywood 1947
description: Hollywood 1947 is Facade Games' Dark Cities entry set during the McCarthy-era Hollywood blacklist — players are studio insiders (writers, actors, producers, FBI informants, secret communists) collaborating on a screenplay while the House Un-American Activities Committee subpoenas, blacklists, and ruins reputations. Hidden roles, paranoia, and a doomed studio system. The book-box is a velvet-bound script.
